results.rendered_html:
madya (von 1. mad)  P. 3,1,100 .  VOP. 26,15 .
1〉 adj. erfreuend, erheiternd, lieblich; berauschend: andhaḥ  ṚV. 2,14,1 . 7,92,1 . soma 6,68,10 . mada 9,6,2 . 23,4 . 86,35 . rasa 9,38,5 . pipīḻe aṃśurmadyo na sindhuḥ 4,22,8 . 8,2,25 . uta vāṃ vikṣu madyāsvandho gāva āpaśca pīpayanta devīḥ 1,153,4 .
— 2〉 n. ein berauschendes Getränk  AK. 2,10,40 . 3,4,17,105 .  TRIK. 2,10,14 .  H. 902 .  HALĀY. 2,175 .  M. 5,56 . 123 . 8,329 . 9,84 . 264 . 10,89 . 11,67 . madyānugabhojanam 11,95 . 97 .  YĀJÑ. 3,40 .  MBH. 12,12550 .  SUŚR. 1,63,6 . 145,13 . 188,12 . 190,16 . 2,355,18 . 459,12 .  ŚĀRṄG. SAṂH. 1,4,21 .  RAGH. 7,46 .  Spr. 1260 . 2898 . 3355 , v. l. 4955 .  KĀM. NĪTIS. 7,20 . 16,33 .  VARĀH. BṚH. S. 46,27 .  KATHĀS. 13,142 . 33,93 . 36,92 . 39,207 .  MĀRK. P. 18,28 .  Verz. d. Oxf. H. 195,b,34 . 276,b,6 . 313,a,11. fg.   SĀH. D. 174 . panasādijanyaṃ madakāraṇaṃ dravadravyaṃ madyamiti mādhavaḥ  PRĀYAŚCITTEND. 67,b,8 .

results.rendered_html:
madya a. [mādyatyanena karaṇe yat]
1 Intoxicating.
2 Gladdening, exhilarating.
— dyaṃ Spirituous liquor, wine, any intoxicating drink; raṇakṣitiḥ śoṇitamadyakulyā  R. 7. 49 ;  Ms. 5. 56 , 9. 84 , 10. 89. 
Comp.
— āmodaḥ the Bakula tree.
— kīṭaḥ a kind of in sect.
— drumaḥ a kind of tree (bhāḍavṛkṣa).
— paḥ a drunkard, tippler, sot.
— paṃkaḥ mash.
— pānaṃ
1 drinking intoxicating liquor.
2 any intoxicating drink.
— pīta a. intoxicated with drink.
— puṣpā the plant called Dhātakī.:
— bī (bī) jaṃ a drug used to cause fermentation, leaven.
— bhājanaṃ a wine-glass; so madyabhāṃḍaṃ.
— maṃḍaḥ barm, yeast.
— vāsinī the plant called dhātakī.
— saṃdhānaṃ distillation of spirit.
